explanation_cards.headline: Pune court scheduling adds time
explanation_cards.detail: The Pune family court currently has a 9-month backlog. Even for collaborative cases, this affects filing and decree timelines.
explanation_cards.what_you_can_do: Filing in January (court calendar reset) can reduce this by 2–3 weeks.

explanation_cards.headline: Custody terms extend negotiation
explanation_cards.detail: Cases with children take longer in the negotiation phase — not because of conflict, but because custody terms require more careful drafting.
explanation_cards.what_you_can_do: Having a clear initial custody proposal ready for week 1 reduces this by up to 5 days.

explanation_cards.headline: No business valuation needed
explanation_cards.detail: Cases without business ownership skip the business valuation phase entirely. This removes a major source of delay and cost.
explanation_cards.what_you_can_do: Nothing required — this is already working in your favour.

explanation_cards.headline: Single property — straightforward
explanation_cards.detail: A single jointly-owned apartment is one of the simpler asset configurations. Property valuation is a one-time event.
explanation_cards.what_you_can_do: Getting the property pre-appraised before legal proceedings start saves 3–5 days.

confidence_statement: These estimates are based on 200,000 similar cases. Meera's case falls within the normal distribution — confidence intervals are standard.
model_note: Explanations use SHAP TreeExplainer values translated to plain language. Raw feature contributions available on request.
